description: Lexicographically earliest infinite sequence of distinct positive numbers such that, for n > 2, a(n) shares a factor with a(n-1) and is coprime to a(n-2) if a(n-1) < a(n-2), else it is coprime to a(n-1) and shares a factor with a(n-2) if a(n-1) > a(n-2).. Start with a(1) = 1, a(2) = 4, a(3) = 9.
